name: WW Lemon Blitz Cake-points:3
recipeInstructions: To make the filling, combine the cornstarch and sugar in a medium-sized saucepan. Stir to mix well. Slowly whisk in the milk using a wire whisk. Place over medium heat and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Continue to cook and stir for 1 minute, or until the mixture is thickened and bubbly. Remove from heat and whisk in the lemon juice and rind. Cover and chill for several hours or overnight to thicken. Just before assembling the cake, gently fold the yogurt into the whipped topping. Set aside. To assemble the cake, cut the angel food cake lengthwise into 3 layers using a bread knife. Stir the filling and spread half of it on the bottom layer. Repeat with the second layer. Top with the third layer and spread the remaining filling evenly. Spread the prepared topping over the top and sides of the cake. Chill for 1 to 2 hours before slicing and serving. Makes 12 servings. POINTS: 3 PER SERVING: 174 Calories, 1.3 g Fat, 0.8 g Fiber, 0 mg Cholesterol, 4.9 g Protein, 238 mg Sodium
